heading: State boards
label: 7428 State boards
notes: Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise expressly provided, see , set out as an Effective Date of 1977 Amendment note under .Aug. 7, 1977section 406(d) of Pub. L. 95–95section 7401 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise expressly provided, see , set out as an Effective Date of 1977 Amendment note under .Aug. 7, 1977section 406(d) of Pub. L. 95–95section 7401 of this title

children.text: any board or body which approves permits or enforcement orders under this chapter shall have at least a majority of members who represent the public interest and do not derive any significant portion of their income from persons subject to permits or enforcement orders under this chapter, and
any potential conflicts of interest by members of such board or body or the head of an executive agency with similar powers be adequately disclosed.
